title: Dendrorkis purpurea

properties: Dendrorkis purpurea, commonly known as the Cape sundew or Drosophyllum lusitanicum, is often confused with Dendrorchis purpurea but there is no information on the therapeutic properties of Dendrorchis purpurea. However, some plants in the Drosophyllaceae family are said to have potential therapeutic benefits such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Further research is needed to confirm any specific health benefits of Dendrorchis purpurea.
